name: Ignis
skillDescription: Deploys a flaming screen that is 10m wide and lasts for 8s. Enemies who touch the screen will take 30 DMG and receive a burning effect, which deals 10 DMG/s and reduces armor durability for 2s.
lore: Ignis is a man who has a deep connection with fire. He can control the flames, using them to protect his allies and destroy his enemies.
